summary: Tested Technician Wizard Review Step (Step 3) overtime display features. All 11 acceptance criteria VERIFIED. Fixed i18n interpolation bug for overtime warning count.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing site 'Офис' (PRJ-002) with predefined SMR tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review step (Step 3) of Technician Wizard fully tested. Key findings: 1) Day Summary card shows 4 quadrants (Хора, Общо часове, Нормални green, Наднормени amber), 2) Overtime warning card appears when any worker has >8h with AlertTriangle icon, 3) Worker cards show avatar, name, activity count, total hours, and 'Наднормено' badge when overtime, 4) Worker cards show 'Нормални: Xч' and 'Наднормени: +Xч' breakdown, 5) Back button returns to Report step, 6) Summary recalculates after editing, 7) Submit button works correctly. Fixed i18n bug: changed {count} to {{count}} for proper interpolation.

Day Summary with 4 quadrants.note: Shows Хора, Общо часове, Нормални (green), Наднормени (amber)

Worker grouping with avatar and name.note: Worker card shows avatar initials, name, activity count, total hours

Overtime badge on worker card.note: 'Наднормено' amber badge appears when worker has >8h total

Overtime warning card.note: Amber card with AlertTriangle icon appears when overtimeCount > 0

Overtime warning count.note: Shows count of workers with overtime (fixed i18n interpolation)

No overtime warning when <=8h.note: Warning card not displayed when all workers have <=8h

Activity lines under worker.note: Shows SMR name + hours under each worker card

Back button functionality.note: Returns to Report step for editing

Summary recalculation.note: Summary updates after editing hours and returning to review

Submit button.note: Submit works, returns to My Day screen with success

i18n_interpolation.issue: overtimeWarning key used {count} instead of {{count}} for i18next interpolation
i18n_interpolation.fix: Changed to {{count}} for proper variable substitution
